text: L'= VPC Subnets © twstteamcanmiia @ adencan ¢ AZ Resilient ¢ A subnetwork of a VPC - within a particular AZ ¢ 1 Subnet => 1 AZ, 1 AZ => 0+ Subnets ¢ [Pv4 CIDR is a subset of the VPC CIDR ¢ Cannot overlap with other subnets ¢ Optional IPv6 CIDR (/64 subset of the /56 VPC - space for 256) * Subnets can communicate with other subnets in the VPC
